'''Vulvarch''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Vulvarch system/Legends|Vulvarch system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]], not far from [[Atzerri/Legends|Atzerri]]. [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] discovered the ''[[Star Morning]]'' docked at Vulvarch while ''en route'' to retrieve the [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] from [[Farlax sector/Legends|Farlax sector]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{Mo}}
